resources.string: Smart weather alerts, AI-driven suggestions, and real-time local forecasts.

Stay ahead of the weather with WeatherX, your intelligent weather companion. WeatherX provides hyper-local forecasts, real-time air quality (AQI) tracking, and smart AI-driven suggestions to help you plan your day. Whether it's recommending an umbrella or warning about extreme heat, WeatherX has you covered.

Key Features:
- Real-time Temperature & Conditions
- 7-Day Detailed Forecast
- Hourly Weather Updates
- Smart AI Weather Assistant
- Air Quality Index (AQI) Monitoring
- Emergency Helplines Integration
- Dynamic, Beautiful Animations based on current weather
- Privacy-focused: No unnecessary data tracking.
